Wiki / Power-ups

Power-ups & buffs

Power-ups are consumables you buy with cash and activate for a timed income multiplier. They're the best way to boost a contract push or a goal sprint.

Reference

All 4 power-ups

Power-upEffectDurationBase cost
Sugar Rush×2 income3 min$250
Blender Fury×3 income5 min$500
Employee Overtime×4 income10 min$1,000
Lucky Batch×5 income2 min$2,000

The multiplier applies to all income — manual blends and passive. Power-ups are bought as stock and then activated when you want them.

Buffs

How buffs stack

They multiply together

Active buffs stack multiplicatively: a ×2 and a ×3 running together give ×6 total income.

Many sources

Buffs come from power-ups, goal rewards, achievement rewards, VIP customers, and timed events — all share the same buff tray.

Timed

Each buff counts down and expires on its own; the income-modifiers panel shows what's active and how long is left.

Stack Lucky Batch (×5) with a contract and fast blending for a huge two-minute burst — or layer multiple power-ups for an even bigger window.

GoalsEarn buffs ProgressionEvents & more
